nodes.name: Time Series Forecasting
nodes.description: Time-series forecasting primitives derived from the ESRNN M4 winning approach: exponential smoothing, multiplicative seasonality, and forecast losses

nodes.name: exponential_smoothing_level
nodes.description: Recursive exponential smoothing level update for a univariate time series

nodes.name: multiplicative_seasonality_decompose
nodes.description: Pointwise multiplicative seasonal factors obtained by dividing observations by the smoothed level
nodes.type_signature: (series: NDArray[np.float64], level: NDArray[np.float64], season_length: int) -> NDArray[np.float64]

nodes.name: smyl_loss
nodes.description: Scalar competition-style loss that averages sMAPE and MASE using a precomputed naive MAE denominator
nodes.type_signature: (forecast: NDArray[np.float64], actual: NDArray[np.float64], naive_mae: float) -> float

nodes.name: pinball_loss
nodes.description: Quantile regression pinball loss averaged over all forecast elements
nodes.type_signature: (forecast: NDArray[np.float64], actual: NDArray[np.float64], tau: float) -> float
